# Mason Borda

> Mason Borda is a financial infrastructure engineer and the inventor of ERC-1404,
> the token standard for SEC-compliant blockchain securities. He founded Tokensoft
> in 2017 — the platform that powered over $1 billion in compliant token offerings
> across 100+ projects in 50+ countries, and was behind the first SEC-registered
> security token IPO in history. Early BitGo engineer (2013). In crypto since 2013.
> Education: BS + MS Electrical Engineering, Cal Poly SLO + Santa Clara University.

## Key Facts

- Inventor of ERC-1404 (Ethereum token standard for SEC-compliant securities)
- Founded Tokensoft (2017): $1B+ in compliant token offerings, 100+ projects, 50+ countries
- Led first SEC-registered security token IPO in history (INX, ~$85M on Ethereum)
- Led first SEC-approved Ethereum-native investment fund (ArCoin, '40 Act, 605-day campaign)
- Co-founded Payroll Integrations (2014): serves 14% of U.S. 401(k) market
- Created wrapped.com with Anchorage: institutional cross-chain asset wrapping
- Built Knox Wallet: first cold storage built specifically for registered securities
- Early BitGo engineer: co-built first commercially viable Ethereum custody solution
- Zero security breaches or regulatory enforcement actions across eight years at Tokensoft
- Featured in CoinDesk, Forbes, Reuters, CNBC, CryptoSlate, The Block

## Press

- Reuters (Feb 2021): Bitcoin Tesla purchase — cited as one of earliest real-world Bitcoin purchases
- Forbes (Aug 2020): Anchorage / wrapped.com — blurring lines between crypto and Wall Street
- CoinDesk (Jul 2020): ArCoin — first Ethereum-native '40 Act fund approved by SEC (605 days)
- CoinDesk (Sep 2020): INX IPO — first SEC-registered security token IPO on Ethereum
- CoinDesk (Dec 2019): Tokensoft SEC Transfer Agent registration — "automated investment bank"
- CoinDesk (Jan 2022): INX acquires Tokensoft transfer agent subsidiary
- CryptoSlate (Sep 2023): Connext NEXT — 1 million registrations, platform record
- CryptoSlate (Mar 2025): Shardeum token sale — 1.4M community members, 50+ countries
- CNBC (Dec 2017): Bitcoin spending — Mason Borda cited as early real-world Bitcoin buyer
- Anthony Pompliano Substack: Interview — Mason Borda, CEO at TokenSoft
- CfC St. Moritz: Speaker profile — https://cfc-stmoritz.com/profiles/mason-borda
- FintechSV: Interview — Mason Borda on digital securities post-regulation
